name: Bandwidth Call
description: Represents a voice call managed through the Bandwidth Voice API, including outbound and inbound calls with state tracking, recording references, and call control metadata.

callId.description: The unique identifier for the call, assigned by Bandwidth

accountId.description: The Bandwidth account ID that owns the call

applicationId.description: The Bandwidth application ID associated with the call

from.description: The originating phone number in E.164 format

to.description: The destination phone number in E.164 format

state.description: The current state of the call

answerUrl.description: The URL that receives the answer webhook and returns BXML

answerMethod.description: The HTTP method for the answer webhook

disconnectUrl.description: The URL that receives the disconnect webhook

disconnectMethod.description: The HTTP method for the disconnect webhook

startTime.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the call was initiated

answerTime.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the call was answered

endTime.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the call ended

disconnectCause.description: The reason the call was disconnected (e.g., hangup, timeout, cancel)

callTimeout.description: The timeout in seconds for the outbound call to be answered

callbackTimeout.description: The timeout in seconds for webhook callback requests

tag.description: A custom string attached to the call for tracking purposes

callUrl.description: The URL for this call resource in the Bandwidth API

Recording.description: A recording of a voice call

recordingId.description: The unique identifier for the recording

callId.description: The call ID associated with this recording

duration.description: The duration of the recording in ISO 8601 format

mediaUrl.description: The URL to download the recording audio

ConferenceMember.description: A member of a conference call

callId.description: The call ID of the conference member

hold.description: Whether the member is on hold
